picks.reason: A withheld sentence creates urgency; side-by-side wording reveals the hidden operational cost.
An immovable date leads to a concrete fallback, switch point, and customer message.
A live inbox problem becomes a sendable sentence both sides can confirm.
Immediate AI risk becomes a focused verification task without discarding useful output.
A visible ending removes subscription pressure and makes ongoing support earn its place.
A screenshot is effortless chat input that yields a specific claim to test.
